title: How to Come Alive with Norman Mailer
original_title: How to Come Alive with Norman Mailer
overview: From Brooklyn beginnings to literary pantheon, Norman Mailer's unorthodox trajectory spans marriages, offspring, and accolades. An unprecedented glimpse into the preeminent 20th-century author's private and public worlds through intimate biography.
